caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a high bun and braids wears a dark green t-shirt with a red and white graphic and black over-ear headphones. She is seated in a studio setting behind a black desk, speaking into a professional black microphone mounted on a boom arm. Behind her is a black backdrop featuring the logo "BOSS TALK 101" and the text "Its A League Hustle" and "About It!". To her left, a framed image of hands is visible on a white wall. Small logos for "BOSS TALK 101" appear in the bottom corners of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position, slightly shifting her facial expression as she talks, maintaining a smile while looking toward someone off-screen to her right. The lighting remains consistent, and the background elements do not change.
